results.title: Methods for collecting saliva.
results.snippet:
PubMed ID: 8215087. 1993/09/20 00:00. OBJECTIVE: Lack of accessible veterinary-specific guidelines for the selection 
of specimen collection containers, transport media, and storage temperatures 
before laboratory arrival leads to suboptimal culture specimen handling, 
negatively impacting specimen quality and diagnostic value. Our objective was to 
summarize best practices for microbiological culture specimen handling by 
veterinary professionals and provide an accessible chart for guidance whe
